services.title: On-Site Bar Setup
services.body: Professional bar setup and breakdown at your venue.

services.title: Catering Services
services.body: Complimentary catering options to enhance your event experience.

services.title: Illuminated Bar Design

services.title: Safety & Compliance
services.body: Ensuring all services meet local health and safety standards.

services.title: Event Consultation
services.body: Expert advice on bar setup, drink selection, and event planning.

faqs.a: Yes, we handle all licensing requirements for your event.

faqs.q: Can you cater to dietary restrictions?
faqs.a: Absolutely, our menu includes options for various dietary needs.

faqs.q: What is included in the setup fee?
faqs.a: The setup fee covers bar equipment, staff, and a basic drink package.

faqs.q: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a: We recommend booking at least 4 weeks before your event date.
